theme: rewire a leaked cipher layer with fewest XOR gates
title: Leaked Cipher Layer: Minimal XOR Rewiring
strategies: independent per-row XOR chain, no sharing (trivial, == checker baseline)
single-pass pairwise common-subexpression elimination over raw columns (greedy)
row-weight clustering + row-space-difference peeling of the planted rank-1 correction (strong)
true shortest linear program (open ceiling, uncovered -- provably minimal SLP synthesis is NP-hard in general)
